justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of a high-yield corporate bond index, which is a standard metric for measuring risk and performance in credit markets.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of the ICE BofA Euro High Yield Index, which tracks the performance of below investment grade corporate debt issued in the euro domestic or eurobond markets, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-06-22?
